name: codex-fast-proxy
description: Codex Model Gateway for using Codex App with third-party OpenAI-compatible APIs.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex App UI features while model requests use your provider.
interface.longDescription: Manage a local, safety-bounded gateway and Agent Skill so Codex App users can sign in with ChatGPT for UI features while model requests continue through a third-party OpenAI-compatible provider. It supports upstream auth split, App-controlled Fast/Priority behavior, benchmark verification, update, and uninstall workflows.
defaultPrompt: Prepare Codex Model Gateway for ChatGPT account login.
